title: Trimurti
desc: A wrongfully convicted policewoman expects her three children to settle scores with her enemy.

title: Mashooq
desc: Karan and Neha fall in love and unaware of their families deadly rivalry.

desc: A family rivalry becomes an obstacle in the way of Karan and Neha's relationship.

title: Prem Granth
desc: A lawyer named Somen, loving Kajri across caste lines, confronts his father's hypocrisy. After trials, he must choose between Kajri and an arranged marriage.

desc: Somen, a rich man, falls in love with Kajri, a village belle, and they get separated unexpectedly.

title: Avtaar
desc: In a heartwarming twist, a man and his wife flourish against the odds, proving that their bond is stronger than the abandonment of their ungrateful sons. Success awaits them!

title: Avtaar
desc: Avtaar reaches new heights of success after his sons betray him and his wife, Radha.

desc: Ajay, driven by his dream to join the police, borrows money but fails to repay. Cornered by debt, he makes a dangerous choice-getting involved in a kidnapping plot.

desc: An aspiring police officer is drawn into the crime world when his dreams get shattered.

desc: A gambler embarks on a mission of vengeance after the murder of his adoptive father.

desc: A man who loses his memory every 15 minutes seeks vengeance after his lover is killed.

desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.
